Name: True Ping
Author: doomzao
Punchline: Your real FFXIV ping: the latency you actually feel, with jitter and loss.
Description:
Measures your true FFXIV ping by timing the game's own keepalive round-trip (the latency the server actually answers), not the OS network latency. Because it reads the game protocol, it reports the real latency you feel even when you route through a proxy or VPN, where ordinary ping tools only see localhost. Shows current ping, average, min, max, jitter and packet loss, in a floating overlay and in the server info bar.

Commands:
/trueping : open the settings window
/trueping overlay : toggle the floating overlay
/trueping dtr : toggle the server info bar entry
/trueping reset : clear the statistics
